vocabulary.example: 细嚼慢咽有助于食物的消化和吸收。
vocabulary.translation: Chewing slowly helps with the digestion and absorption of food.

vocabulary.example: 豆腐和鸡蛋都是优质蛋白质的来源。
vocabulary.translation: Tofu and eggs are both sources of high-quality protein.

vocabulary.example: 人体需要一定量的脂肪来维持正常的生理功能。
vocabulary.translation: The human body needs a certain amount of fat to maintain normal physiological functions.

vocabulary.example: 多吃蔬菜水果可以补充人体所需的维生素。
vocabulary.translation: Eating more vegetables and fruits can supplement the vitamins the body needs.

vocabulary.example: 很多人不了解食物的热量，导致不经意间摄入过多。
vocabulary.translation: Many people do not understand the caloric content of food, leading to unintentional overconsumption.

vocabulary.example: 合理的食物搭配能够提高营养的吸收效率。
vocabulary.translation: A reasonable food combination can improve the efficiency of nutrient absorption.

vocabulary.example: 不健康的饮食习惯是导致多种慢性病的重要原因。
vocabulary.translation: Unhealthy eating habits are an important cause of many chronic diseases.

vocabulary.example: 合理饮食是预防慢性病的最自然的方法之一。
vocabulary.translation: A reasonable diet is one of the most natural ways to prevent chronic diseases.

vocabulary.example: 规律的饮食习惯对维持血糖稳定非常重要。
vocabulary.translation: Regular eating habits are very important for maintaining stable blood sugar levels.

vocabulary.example: 长期依赖营养补充剂不如从天然食物中获取营养。
vocabulary.translation: Long-term reliance on nutritional supplements is not as good as obtaining nutrients from natural foods.

vocabulary.example: 很多加工食品含有大量隐藏的糖分，长期摄入不利于健康。
vocabulary.translation: Many processed foods contain large amounts of hidden sugar; long-term consumption is harmful to health.

vocabulary.example: 牛奶和绿叶蔬菜是补充钙等矿物质的良好来源。
vocabulary.translation: Milk and leafy vegetables are good sources of minerals such as calcium.

vocabulary.example: 多吃富含纤维的食物有助于消化和预防便秘。
vocabulary.translation: Eating more fiber-rich foods helps with digestion and prevents constipation.

vocabulary.example: 全谷物比精制谷物含有更多的纤维和微量元素。
vocabulary.translation: Whole grains contain more fiber and trace elements than refined grains.

key_sentences.chinese: 关键在于养成长期均衡饮食的习惯，而不是短期节食。
key_sentences.pinyin: Guān jiàn zài yú yǎng chéng cháng qī jūn héng yǐn shí de xí guàn, ér bú shì duǎn qī jié shí.
key_sentences.english: The key lies in developing long-term balanced eating habits, not short-term dieting.

key_sentences.chinese: 不仅如此，规律的饮食时间对血糖稳定也至关重要。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bù jǐn rú cǐ, guī lǜ de yǐn shí shí jiān duì xuè táng wěn dìng yě zhì guān zhòng yào.
key_sentences.english: Moreover, regular meal times are also crucial for maintaining stable blood sugar.

key_sentences.chinese: 她宁可每天花时间准备营养均衡的餐食，也不靠营养补充剂。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā nìng kě měi tiān huā shí jiān zhǔn bèi yíng yǎng jūn héng de cān shí, yě bù kào yíng yǎng bǔ chōng jì.
key_sentences.english: She would rather spend time every day preparing nutritionally balanced meals than rely on supplements.

key_sentences.chinese: 科学研究表明，合理搭配食物能显著提高营养的吸收效率。
key_sentences.pinyin: Kē xué yán jiū biǎo míng, hé lǐ dā pèi shí wù néng xiǎn zhù tí gāo yíng yǎng de xī shōu xiào lǜ.
key_sentences.english: Scientific research shows that a reasonable food combination can significantly improve nutrient absorption efficiency.

key_sentences.chinese: 关键在于了解自己的身体需求，而不是盲目跟随流行的节食方法。
key_sentences.pinyin: Guān jiàn zài yú liǎo jiě zì jǐ de shēn tǐ xū qiú, ér bú shì máng mù gēn suí liú xíng de jié shí fāng fǎ.
key_sentences.english: The key lies in understanding your own body's needs rather than blindly following trendy diet methods.

key_sentences.chinese: 不仅如此，过度节食还可能导致新陈代谢减慢，反而不利于减重。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bù jǐn rú cǐ, guò dù jié shí hái kě néng dǎo zhì xīn chén dài xiè jiǎn màn, fǎn ér bú lì yú jiǎn zhòng.
key_sentences.english: Moreover, excessive dieting may also slow down metabolism, which is actually not conducive to weight loss.

key_sentences.chinese: 谷物中富含膳食纤维，有助于促进消化、控制血糖，是健康饮食的重要组成部分。
key_sentences.pinyin: Gǔ wù zhōng fù hán shàn shí xiān wéi, yǒu zhù yú cù jìn xiāo huà, kòng zhì xuè táng, shì jiàn kāng yǐn shí de zhòng yào zǔ chéng bù fèn.
key_sentences.english: Grains are rich in dietary fiber, which promotes digestion and controls blood sugar — they are an important component of a healthy diet.

key_sentences.chinese: 过量摄入糖分会加快热量积累，不仅如此，还会增加患慢性病的风险。
key_sentences.pinyin: Guò liàng shè rù táng fèn huì jiā kuài rè liàng jī lěi, bù jǐn rú cǐ, hái huì zēng jiā huàn màn xìng bìng de fēng xiǎn.
key_sentences.english: Excessive intake of sugar accelerates calorie accumulation; moreover, it also increases the risk of developing chronic diseases.

key_sentences.chinese: 矿物质和微量元素虽然需要量少，但对维持正常生理功能不可或缺。
key_sentences.pinyin: Kuàng wù zhì hé wēi liàng yuán sù suī rán xū yào liàng shǎo, dàn duì wéi chí zhèng cháng shēng lǐ gōng néng bù kě huò quē.
key_sentences.english: Although minerals and trace elements are needed in small amounts, they are indispensable for maintaining normal physiological functions.

key_sentences.chinese: 碳水化合物是人体能量的主要来源，关键在于选择谷物等富含纤维的天然食物。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tàn shuǐ huà hé wù shì rén tǐ néng liàng de zhǔ yào lái yuán, guān jiàn zài yú xuǎn zé gǔ wù děng fù hán xiān wéi de tiān rán shí wù.
key_sentences.english: Carbohydrates are the main source of energy for the human body; the key lies in choosing natural foods rich in fiber, such as grains.

key_sentences.chinese: 合理搭配蛋白质、脂肪、碳水化合物及矿物质，是预防慢性病、维持长期健康的科学基础。
key_sentences.pinyin: Hé lǐ dā pèi dàn bái zhì, zhī fáng, tàn shuǐ huà hé wù jí kuàng wù zhì, shì yù fáng màn xìng bìng, wéi chí cháng qī jiàn kāng de kē xué jī chǔ.
key_sentences.english: Properly combining proteins, fats, carbohydrates, and minerals is the scientific foundation for preventing chronic diseases and maintaining long-term health.

grammar_points.meaning: The key lies in / The key is
grammar_points.explanation: 关键在于 is used to highlight the most important or essential aspect of something. Structure: 关键在于 + [noun phrase / verb phrase]. It is followed by a noun phrase or verb phrase indicating what the crucial element is.

examples.chinese: 成功的关键在于坚持不懈的努力。
examples.pinyin: Chéng gōng de guān jiàn zài yú jiān chí bù xiè de nǔ lì.
examples.english: The key to success lies in persistent and unwavering effort.

examples.chinese: 健康的关键在于良好的生活习惯。
examples.pinyin: Jiàn kāng de guān jiàn zài yú liáng hǎo de shēng huó xí guàn.
examples.english: The key to health lies in good lifestyle habits.

exercises.question: Fill in: 提高成绩的___坚持每天复习，而不是临时抱佛脚。
关键在于 is typically followed by:
choices: The most important factor or action

exercises.question: Which sentence is grammatically correct?
choices: 减重的关键在于控制饮食和坚持运动。
关键在于他去了北京，所以成功了。
关键在于，虽然他努力，但是失败。

exercises.question: Choose the best translation: The key to language learning lies in daily practice.
choices: 语言学习的关键在于每天练习。
语言学习关键因为每天练习。
语言学习关键是没有每天练习。
语言学习虽然关键，但是每天练习。

exercises.question: What does 关键在于 emphasize?

grammar_points.meaning: Moreover, not only that, in addition to this
grammar_points.explanation: 不仅如此 (literally 'not only this') is used to introduce an additional point that goes beyond what was already stated. Structure: [Statement A] → 不仅如此，[further point going beyond A]. It is used at the start of a sentence to extend an argument.

examples.chinese: 这种饮食方法能帮助减重，不仅如此，还能改善整体健康状况。
examples.pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yǐn shí fāng fǎ néng bāng zhù jiǎn zhòng，bù jǐn rú cǐ，hái néng gǎi shàn zhěng tǐ jiàn kāng zhuàng kuàng.
examples.english: This diet method can help with weight loss; moreover, it can also improve overall health.

examples.chinese: 这本书写得很好，不仅如此，插图也非常精美。
examples.pinyin: Zhè běn shū xiě de hěn hǎo，bù jǐn rú cǐ，chā tú yě fēi cháng jīng měi.
examples.english: This book is very well written; not only that, the illustrations are also exquisite.

exercises.question: Choose the best completion: 运动可以减肥，___，它还能改善心情。
不仅如此 is used to:
choices: Add a further point beyond what was said

exercises.question: Which sentence uses 不仅如此 correctly?
choices: 她工作很努力，不仅如此，她还很有创意。
不仅如此他很聪明，但是很懒。
他不仅如此去了，所以回来了。

exercises.question: Fill in: 这家餐厅的菜很好吃，___，服务也非常周到。
不仅如此 is closest in meaning to:

grammar_points.explanation: 宁可…也不… expresses a preference for one option over another, even when the preferred option may involve sacrifice. Structure: Subject + 宁可 + [preferred option]，也不 + [rejected option]. It stresses a firm personal choice. 宁可 introduces what the person chooses; 也不 introduces what they refuse.

examples.chinese: 他宁可睡在路边，也不愿意回那个家。
examples.pinyin: Tā nìng kě shuì zài lù biān，yě bù yuàn yì huí nà ge jiā.
examples.english: He would rather sleep by the roadside than go back to that home.

examples.chinese: 我宁可多花时间准备，也不随便交差。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ nìng kě duō huā shí jiān zhǔn bèi，yě bù suí biàn jiāo chāi.
examples.english: I would rather spend more time preparing than hand in sloppy work.

exercises.question: Fill in: 她___每天步行上班，___坐拥挤的地铁。
Which sentence uses 宁可…也不 correctly?
choices: 我宁可吃少点，也不吃垃圾食品。
宁可虽然他努力，也不放弃。
他宁可去了，也不因为累。

exercises.question: Which is the best translation of 'She would rather cook at home than eat fast food'?
choices: 她宁可在家做饭，也不吃快餐。
她虽然在家做饭，也不吃快餐。
她因为在家做饭，也不吃快餐。
她宁可吃快餐，也不在家做饭。

culture_notes.title: Food as Medicine: The Chinese Principle of 药食同源
culture_notes.content:
药食同源 (yào shí tóng yuán) literally means 'medicine and food share the same origin.' This ancient concept from Traditional Chinese Medicine (中医 zhōng yī) holds that many foods serve as medicine, and that the distinction between food and remedy is not absolute.

In Chinese culture, food is not merely fuel — it is also a way to maintain balance, prevent illness, and restore health. Foods are categorized by their 'nature' (性质 xìngzhì): warm (温 wēn), cool (凉 liáng), hot (热 rè), or cold (寒 hán), and their flavor (味 wèi): sweet (甜 tián), sour (酸 suān), bitter (苦 kǔ), spicy (辣 là), salty (咸 xián).

For example, ginger (生姜 shēng jiāng) is considered warming and is used to treat colds. Green tea (绿茶 lǜ chá) is cooling and said to clear internal heat. Red dates (红枣 hóng zǎo) are sweet and nourishing for the blood.

This philosophy has shaped Chinese cooking for thousands of years. A skilled Chinese cook considers not just taste, but the health effects of each ingredient. Today, 药食同源 continues to influence how Chinese families eat — seasonal eating, congee (粥 zhōu) for recovery, and soup-based meals are all expressions of this wisdom.

quiz.question: 过量摄入_____会加速热量积累，增加患慢性病的风险。
关键在于 is used to:
碳水化合物是人体能量的主要来源，其中_____含有丰富的膳食纤维。
Choose the correct sentence using 不仅如此:
choices: 这种方法有效，不仅如此，副作用也很少。
不仅如此他很累，所以去睡了。
他不仅如此，虽然努力了。

quiz.question: Which phrase refers to nutrients the body needs only in very small amounts, such as iron and zinc?
宁可…也不 expresses:
choices: A preference — choosing one thing over another

quiz.question: What does 药食同源 mean?
choices: Medicine and food share the same origin
Vitamins are more important than diet

quiz.question: Fill in: 健康的___是均衡饮食，而不是极端节食。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 加缪，你最近在健身，饮食上有什么变化吗？
lines.pinyin: Jiā miù, nǐ zuì jìn zài jiàn shēn, yǐn shí shàng yǒu shén me biàn huà ma?
lines.english: Camus, you've been working out lately — have you made any changes to your diet?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 有啊，我开始注重蛋白质、维生素和膳食纤维的摄入，减少脂肪和糖分。关键在于均衡，而不是单纯少吃。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu a, wǒ kāi shǐ zhù zhòng dàn bái zhì, wéi shēng sù hé shàn shí xiān wéi de shè rù, jiǎn shǎo zhī fáng hé táng fēn. Guān jiàn zài yú jūn héng, ér bú shì dān chún shǎo chī.
lines.english: Yes, I've started paying more attention to protein, vitamins and dietary fiber intake and reducing fat and sugar. The key lies in balance, not just eating less.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 不仅如此，还有微量元素，比如钙、铁、锰、钾等。以及运动、睡眠和压力管理，这些都很重要吧？
lines.pinyin: Bù jǐn rú cǐ, hái yǒu wēi liàng yuán sù, bǐ rú gài tiě měng jiǎ děng, yǐ jí yùn dòng, shuì mián hé yā lì guǎn lǐ, zhè xiē dōu hěn zhòng yào ba?
lines.english: Moreover, also important are trace elements such as calcium, iron, manganese, and potassium. And exercise, sleep, and stress management are also crucial, right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对，这些都影响新陈代谢。我宁可每天多花一小时准备营养餐，也不依赖外卖。
lines.pinyin: Duì, zhè xiē dōu yǐng xiǎng xīn chén dài xiè. Wǒ nìng kě měi tiān duō huā yī xiǎo shí zhǔn bèi yíng yǎng cān, yě bù yī lài wài mài.
lines.english: Right, these all affect metabolism. I'd rather spend an extra hour preparing nutritious meals every day than rely on takeout.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这种坚持真让我佩服。科学饮食确实需要长期的自律。
lines.pinyin: Zhè zhǒng jiān chí zhēn ràng wǒ pèi fú. Kē xué yǐn shí quē shí xū yào cháng qī de zì lǜ.
lines.english: This kind of dedication is truly admirable. Scientific eating does require long-term self-discipline.

dialogues.title: Food as medicine — a Chinese perspective

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我最近了解到中医的药食同源理念，觉得很有道理。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zuì jìn liǎo jiě dào zhōng yī de yào shí tóng yuán lǐ niàn, jué de hěn yǒu dào lǐ.
lines.english: I've recently learned about the traditional Chinese medicine concept of 'food as medicine' — I think it makes a lot of sense.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 对，中国人自古就认为食物不仅仅是果腹的，而是养生的工具。
lines.pinyin: Duì, Zhōng guó rén zì gǔ jiù rèn wéi shí wù bù jǐn jǐn shì guǒ fù de, ér shì yǎng shēng de gōng jù.
lines.english: Right, the Chinese have long believed that food is not merely for filling one's stomach, but is a tool for maintaining health.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 不仅如此，食物还分寒热性质，可以调节身体的平衡。
lines.pinyin: Bù jǐn rú cǐ, shí wù hái fēn hán rè xìng zhì, kě yǐ tiáo jié shēn tǐ de píng héng.
lines.english: Moreover, foods are also categorized by cold and warm properties and can regulate the body's balance.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这让我想起祖母，她总说冬天要多吃生姜，夏天多喝绿茶。原来都有科学依据。
lines.pinyin: Zhè ràng wǒ xiǎng qǐ zǔ mǔ,tā zǒng shuō dōng tiān yào duō chī shēng jiāng, xià tiān duō hē lǜ chá. Yuán lái dōu yǒu kē xué yī jù.
lines.english: That reminds me — my grandmother always said to eat more ginger in winter and drink more green tea in summer. Turns out there's scientific reasoning behind it all.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是啊，关键在于尊重传统智慧，同时结合现代营养学，这才是最科学的饮食方式。
lines.pinyin: Shì a, guān jiàn zài yú zūn zhòng chuán tǒng zhì huì, tóng shí jié hé xiàn dài yíng yǎng xué, zhè cái shì zuì kē xué de yǐn shí fāng shì.
lines.english: Indeed, the key lies in respecting traditional wisdom while combining it with modern nutrition — that is the most scientific approach to eating.
